title: Nebulous: closed-claims archive curation claim opened
body: Opened claim a4c7184a for a dedicated knowledge-curation pass over closed-claims.archive.json and repo-continuity.md. Live state before claim: 0 active claims and 0 commit intents. Goal is to mine archived claims for durable knowledge, route useful substance to permanent homes, delete the processed archive, and consolidate repo-continuity without fabricating evidence summaries.
